# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-network
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: firewall-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-firewall-rule
      network: $(ref. network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports: [80, 443]
        - IPProtocol: UDP

  - name: instance-group-manager
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-instance-group-manager
      baseInstanceName: ${project-id}-vm
      targetSize: 2

  - name: instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-instance-template
      machineType: f1-micro
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          diskSizeGb: 10
          diskType: projects/${project-id}/zones/${zone}/diskTypes/pd-ssd
      networkInterfaces:
        - accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-instance-group
      instances:
        - zone: $(zone)
          instanceRef:
            managedInstanceRef:
              name: $(ref. instance-group-manager.selfLink)

  - name: load-balancer-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.regionBackendService
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-load-balancer-backend-service
      backend:
        fcuGroupRef:
          name: $(ref. instance-group.selfLink)
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref. health-check.selfLink)

  - name: load-balancer-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.regionTargetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-load-balancer-forwarding-rule

  - name: load-balancer-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-load-balancer-target-http-proxy

  - name: health-check
    type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-health-check
      requestPath: /
      port: 80

  - name: cloud-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1.instance
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-cloud-sql-instance
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_12
      region: $(region)
      settings:
        tier: db-n1-standard-2
        availabilityType: ZONAL

  - name: cloud-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-cloud-storage-bucket
